A glimpse of our work

What We Do

01

Event Photography & Videography

Full coverage of corporate events, galas, concerts, and community gatherings. Every moment preserved with intention.

02

Drone Photography & Videography

Licensed drone operations across Greater Victoria. Aerial perspectives that ground-level cameras simply cannot reach.

03

Real Estate

Property photography and aerial drone footage that helps listings stand out — interior, exterior, and neighbourhood context.

04

Community & Cultural Events

Experienced covering cultural festivals, heritage events, and community milestones across Victoria and Greater BC.

05

Portraits

Studio and on-location portrait sessions for individuals, professionals, creatives, and families.

06

Weddings, Graduations & Corporate

Milestone coverage with a documentary eye — candid, warm, and true to the moment.

About

Carlos Miranda

Born in Peru, based in Victoria, BC — I've spent years chasing light across two hemispheres. I've backpacked through Europe from Germany to Greece, wandered the streets of Türkiye and the Middle East, and travelled through most of my homeland of Peru. But Vietnam keeps calling me back.

I've found stillness in Japan, energy in Saigon, and perspective on every summit, rooftop, and runway I've ever pointed a lens at. That restlessness is the eye I bring to every project.

"An image and a video with the perfect sound doesn't even need words. Images show emotions that words can never fully explain."

I love creating content and collaborating — with communities, with artists, with businesses who believe that visual storytelling is the most honest thing you can share. Whether I'm flying a drone over the coastline or covering a cultural festival at Ship Point, I'm looking for the same thing: something real, held still.

Published photographer
Transport Canada Licensed Drone Pilot
Victoria, BC — serving Greater Vancouver Island
